text: Community toilet near the market is unusable. Vendors and visitors have no facility.
translatedText: Community toilet near the market is unusable. Vendors and visitors have no facility.

text: हमारे मोहल्ले में नल का पानी नहीं आता। महिलाएँ दूर से पानी लाती हैं।
translatedText: Our colony has no tap water. Women fetch water from far away.

text: Requesting benches and drinking water facility at the primary school. Children sit on the floor.
translatedText: Requesting benches and drinking water facility at the primary school. Children sit on the floor.

text: Borewell water is fluoride contaminated. We need a protected drinking water scheme urgently.
translatedText: Borewell water is fluoride contaminated. We need a protected drinking water scheme urgently.

text: मुख्य सड़क पर बड़े-बड़े गड्ढे हैं, रोज़ दुर्घटनाएँ होती हैं। कृपया मरम्मत करवाएँ।
translatedText: The main road has big potholes; accidents happen daily. Please get it repaired.

text: Community toilet near the market is unusable. Vendors and visitors have no facility.
translatedText: Community toilet near the market is unusable. Vendors and visitors have no facility.

text: குழாய் நீர் இணைப்பு எங்கள் பகுதிக்கு இன்னும் வரவில்லை.
translatedText: Piped water connection has still not reached our area.

text: எங்கள் பள்ளியில் ஆசிரியர்கள் பற்றாக்குறை உள்ளது. இரண்டு வகுப்புகளுக்கு ஒரே ஆசிரியர்.
translatedText: Our school has a teacher shortage; one teacher for two classes.

text: వారానికి ఒక్కసారే నీళ్లు వస్తున్నాయి. ట్యాంకర్ కోసం గంటలు నిలబడాలి.
translatedText: Water comes only once a week. We stand in line for hours for the tanker.

text: Requesting benches and drinking water facility at the primary school. Children sit on the floor.
translatedText: Requesting benches and drinking water facility at the primary school. Children sit on the floor.

text: गाँव में कोई दवाखाना नहीं है। बुज़ुर्गों को इलाज के लिए शहर ले जाना पड़ता है।
translatedText: There is no clinic in the village. The elderly must be taken to town for treatment.

text: Requesting a tailoring unit for the women's self-help groups; they have training but no equipment.
translatedText: Requesting a tailoring unit for the women's self-help groups; they have training but no equipment.

text: ప్రభుత్వ పాఠశాలలో తరగతి గదులు సరిపోవడం లేదు, ఒక్క గదిలో రెండు తరగతులు నడుస్తున్నాయి.
translatedText: Classrooms in the government school are insufficient; two classes run in one room.

text: మా ఊరిలో హైస్కూల్ లేదు, పిల్లలు రోజూ 6 కిలోమీటర్లు నడిచి వెళ్తున్నారు. దయచేసి స్కూల్ అప్‌గ్రేడ్ చేయండి.
translatedText: There is no high school in our village; children walk 6 km every day. Please upgrade the school.

text: नहर की मरम्मत नहीं हुई है, आखिरी खेतों तक पानी नहीं पहुँचता।
translatedText: The canal has not been repaired; water does not reach the last fields.

text: The bridge culvert near the tank overflows every rainy season and cuts off three villages.
translatedText: The bridge culvert near the tank overflows every rainy season and cuts off three villages.

text: బస్సు మా ఊరికి రావడం లేదు ఎందుకంటే రోడ్డు బాగోలేదు. విద్యార్థులు ఇబ్బంది పడుతున్నారు.
translatedText: The bus does not come to our village because the road is bad. Students suffer.

text: मनरेगा का काम समय पर नहीं मिलता और भुगतान महीनों रुका रहता है।
translatedText: MGNREGA work is not given on time and payments are delayed for months.

text: మా ఊరిలో హైస్కూల్ లేదు, పిల్లలు రోజూ 6 కిలోమీటర్లు నడిచి వెళ్తున్నారు. దయచేసి స్కూల్ అప్‌గ్రేడ్ చేయండి.
translatedText: There is no high school in our village; children walk 6 km every day. Please upgrade the school.
photoNote: Photo attached by citizen showing the reported issue.

text: कचरा उठाने की कोई व्यवस्था नहीं है, जगह-जगह ढेर लगे हैं।
translatedText: There is no garbage collection; heaps are piling up everywhere.

text: కూరగాయల ధరలు పడిపోయినప్పుడు నిల్వ చేసుకోవడానికి కోల్డ్ స్టోరేజీ లేదు.
translatedText: When vegetable prices crash there is no cold storage to keep produce.
photoNote: Photo attached by citizen showing the reported issue.

text: పీహెచ్‌సీలో డాక్టర్ వారానికి రెండు రోజులే వస్తారు. రాత్రి ఎమర్జెన్సీ వస్తే 30 కిలోమీటర్లు వెళ్ళాలి.
translatedText: The PHC doctor comes only two days a week. For a night emergency we must travel 30 km.

text: Requesting a tailoring unit for the women's self-help groups; they have training but no equipment.
translatedText: Requesting a tailoring unit for the women's self-help groups; they have training but no equipment.

text: नहर की मरम्मत नहीं हुई है, आखिरी खेतों तक पानी नहीं पहुँचता।
translatedText: The canal has not been repaired; water does not reach the last fields.
photoNote: Photo attached by citizen showing the reported issue.

text: ఆశా వర్కర్లకు మందుల కిట్లు అందడం లేదు.
translatedText: ASHA workers are not receiving medicine kits.

text: Street from the market to the bus stand needs urgent repair, autos refuse to ply after dark.
translatedText: Street from the market to the bus stand needs urgent repair, autos refuse to ply after dark.

text: వారానికి ఒక్కసారే నీళ్లు వస్తున్నాయి. ట్యాంకర్ కోసం గంటలు నిలబడాలి.

translatedText: The canal has not been repaired; water does not reach the last fields.

text: हमारे स्कूल में विज्ञान की प्रयोगशाला नहीं है। बच्चों को प्रैक्टिकल के लिए शहर जाना पड़ता है।
translatedText: Our school has no science lab. Children must travel to town for practicals.

text: Requesting a tailoring unit for the women's self-help groups; they have training but no equipment.
translatedText: Requesting a tailoring unit for the women's self-help groups; they have training but no equipment.

text: Borewell water is fluoride contaminated. We need a protected drinking water scheme urgently.
translatedText: Borewell water is fluoride contaminated. We need a protected drinking water scheme urgently.

text: డిగ్రీ అయిపోయిన యువతకు పని లేదు. స్కిల్ ట్రైనింగ్ సెంటర్ కావాలి.
translatedText: Graduated youth have no work. We need a skill training centre.

translatedText: The tank has dried up; there is no water even for cattle.

text: Borewell water is fluoride contaminated. We need a protected drinking water scheme urgently.
translatedText: Borewell water is fluoride contaminated. We need a protected drinking water scheme urgently.

text: చెరువు ఎండిపోయింది, పశువులకు కూడా నీళ్లు లేవు.
translatedText: The tank has dried up; there is no water even for cattle.

translatedText: The bus does not come to our village because the road is bad. Students suffer.
photoNote: Photo attached by citizen showing the reported issue.

text: Girls are dropping out after 7th class because the nearest high school is too far and there is no bus.
translatedText: Girls are dropping out after 7th class because the nearest high school is too far and there is no bus.
photoNote: Photo attached by citizen showing the reported issue.

text: Street from the market to the bus stand needs urgent repair, autos refuse to ply after dark.
translatedText: Street from the market to the bus stand needs urgent repair, autos refuse to ply after dark.

text: गाँव में कोई दवाखाना नहीं है। बुज़ुर्गों को इलाज के लिए शहर ले जाना पड़ता है।
translatedText: There is no clinic in the village. The elderly must be taken to town for treatment.

text: எங்கள் பள்ளியில் ஆசிரியர்கள் பற்றாக்குறை உள்ளது. இரண்டு வகுப்புகளுக்கு ஒரே ஆசிரியர்.
translatedText: Our school has a teacher shortage; one teacher for two classes.

text: రోజూ 4-5 గంటలు కరెంటు పోతుంది. పంట మోటార్లకు రాత్రి మాత్రమే కరెంటు ఇస్తున్నారు.
translatedText: Power goes off 4-5 hours daily. Crop motors get power only at night.

text: డిగ్రీ అయిపోయిన యువతకు పని లేదు. స్కిల్ ట్రైనింగ్ సెంటర్ కావాలి.
translatedText: Graduated youth have no work. We need a skill training centre.

text: உள் தெருக்கள் அனைத்தும் மண் சாலைகள். சிமெண்ட் சாலை போட்டுத் தரவும்.
translatedText: All inner streets are mud roads. Please lay cement roads.

text: मनरेगा का काम समय पर नहीं मिलता और भुगतान महीनों रुका रहता है।
translatedText: MGNREGA work is not given on time and payments are delayed for months.

text: Farmers need a soil testing centre; the nearest one is in the district headquarters.
translatedText: Farmers need a soil testing centre; the nearest one is in the district headquarters.

text: వారానికి ఒక్కసారే నీళ్లు వస్తున్నాయి. ట్యాంకర్ కోసం గంటలు నిలబడాలి.
translatedText: Water comes only once a week. We stand in line for hours for the tanker.

text: Street from the market to the bus stand needs urgent repair, autos refuse to ply after dark.
translatedText: Street from the market to the bus stand needs urgent repair, autos refuse to ply after dark.

text: Requesting a 24x7 delivery facility. Pregnant women are being referred 40 km away at night.
translatedText: Requesting a 24x7 delivery facility. Pregnant women are being referred 40 km away at night.

text: मनरेगा का काम समय पर नहीं मिलता और भुगतान महीनों रुका रहता है।
translatedText: MGNREGA work is not given on time and payments are delayed for months.

text: వారానికి ఒక్కసారే నీళ్లు వస్తున్నాయి. ట్యాంకర్ కోసం గంటలు నిలబడాలి.
translatedText: Water comes only once a week. We stand in line for hours for the tanker.

text: गली में स्ट्रीट लाइट नहीं है, रात में महिलाओं का निकलना मुश्किल है।
translatedText: There are no street lights in the lane; it is hard for women to go out at night.

text: బస్సు మా ఊరికి రావడం లేదు ఎందుకంటే రోడ్డు బాగోలేదు. విద్యార్థులు ఇబ్బంది పడుతున్నారు.
translatedText: The bus does not come to our village because the road is bad. Students suffer.

text: ఆశా వర్కర్లకు మందుల కిట్లు అందడం లేదు.
translatedText: ASHA workers are not receiving medicine kits.

text: कचरा उठाने की कोई व्यवस्था नहीं है, जगह-जगह ढेर लगे हैं।
translatedText: There is no garbage collection; heaps are piling up everywhere.

text: చెరువు ఎండిపోయింది, పశువులకు కూడా నీళ్లు లేవు.
translatedText: The tank has dried up; there is no water even for cattle.

text: Transformer near the school has been sparking for weeks. It is dangerous for children.
translatedText: Transformer near the school has been sparking for weeks. It is dangerous for children.

text: వారానికి ఒక్కసారే నీళ్లు వస్తున్నాయి. ట్యాంకర్ కోసం గంటలు నిలబడాలి.
translatedText: Water comes only once a week. We stand in line for hours for the tanker.

text: Requesting a tailoring unit for the women's self-help groups; they have training but no equipment.
translatedText: Requesting a tailoring unit for the women's self-help groups; they have training but no equipment.

text: బస్సు మా ఊరికి రావడం లేదు ఎందుకంటే రోడ్డు బాగోలేదు. విద్యార్థులు ఇబ్బంది పడుతున్నారు.
translatedText: The bus does not come to our village because the road is bad. Students suffer.

text: మా ఊరిలో హైస్కూల్ లేదు, పిల్లలు రోజూ 6 కిలోమీటర్లు నడిచి వెళ్తున్నారు. దయచేసి స్కూల్ అప్‌గ్రేడ్ చేయండి.
translatedText: There is no high school in our village; children walk 6 km every day. Please upgrade the school.

text: गली में स्ट्रीट लाइट नहीं है, रात में महिलाओं का निकलना मुश्किल है।
translatedText: There are no street lights in the lane; it is hard for women to go out at night.

text: పీహెచ్‌సీలో డాక్టర్ వారానికి రెండు రోజులే వస్తారు. రాత్రి ఎమర్జెన్సీ వస్తే 30 కిలోమీటర్లు వెళ్ళాలి.
translatedText: The PHC doctor comes only two days a week. For a night emergency we must travel 30 km.

text: వారానికి ఒక్కసారే నీళ్లు వస్తున్నాయి. ట్యాంకర్ కోసం గంటలు నిలబడాలి.
translatedText: Water comes only once a week. We stand in line for hours for the tanker.

text: డ్రైనేజీ కాలువలు నిండిపోయి రోడ్డు మీద మురుగు నీరు నిలుస్తుంది. దోమలు పెరిగిపోయాయి.
translatedText: Drainage canals are full and sewage stagnates on the road. Mosquitoes have multiplied.

text: गाँव में कोई दवाखाना नहीं है। बुज़ुर्गों को इलाज के लिए शहर ले जाना पड़ता है।
translatedText: There is no clinic in the village. The elderly must be taken to town for treatment.

text: Borewell water is fluoride contaminated. We need a protected drinking water scheme urgently.
translatedText: Borewell water is fluoride contaminated. We need a protected drinking water scheme urgently.

text: Farmers need a soil testing centre; the nearest one is in the district headquarters.
translatedText: Farmers need a soil testing centre; the nearest one is in the district headquarters.

text: Requesting a tailoring unit for the women's self-help groups; they have training but no equipment.
translatedText: Requesting a tailoring unit for the women's self-help groups; they have training but no equipment.
photoNote: Photo attached by citizen showing the reported issue.

text: చెరువు ఎండిపోయింది, పశువులకు కూడా నీళ్లు లేవు.
translatedText: The tank has dried up; there is no water even for cattle.

text: ఆశా వర్కర్లకు మందుల కిట్లు అందడం లేదు.
translatedText: ASHA workers are not receiving medicine kits.

text: मनरेगा का काम समय पर नहीं मिलता और भुगतान महीनों रुका रहता है।
translatedText: MGNREGA work is not given on time and payments are delayed for months.

text: వారానికి ఒక్కసారే నీళ్లు వస్తున్నాయి. ట్యాంకర్ కోసం గంటలు నిలబడాలి.
translatedText: Water comes only once a week. We stand in line for hours for the tanker.

translatedText: Requesting a tailoring unit for the women's self-help groups; they have training but no equipment.
photoNote: Photo attached by citizen showing the reported issue.

translatedText: There are no street lights in the lane; it is hard for women to go out at night.

text: పీహెచ్‌సీలో డాక్టర్ వారానికి రెండు రోజులే వస్తారు. రాత్రి ఎమర్జెన్సీ వస్తే 30 కిలోమీటర్లు వెళ్ళాలి.
translatedText: The PHC doctor comes only two days a week. For a night emergency we must travel 30 km.

text: Requesting benches and drinking water facility at the primary school. Children sit on the floor.
translatedText: Requesting benches and drinking water facility at the primary school. Children sit on the floor.

text: Farmers need a soil testing centre; the nearest one is in the district headquarters.
translatedText: Farmers need a soil testing centre; the nearest one is in the district headquarters.

text: உள் தெருக்கள் அனைத்தும் மண் சாலைகள். சிமெண்ட் சாலை போட்டுத் தரவும்.
translatedText: All inner streets are mud roads. Please lay cement roads.
photoNote: Photo attached by citizen showing the reported issue.

text: मनरेगा का काम समय पर नहीं मिलता और भुगतान महीनों रुका रहता है।
translatedText: MGNREGA work is not given on time and payments are delayed for months.

text: కూరగాయల ధరలు పడిపోయినప్పుడు నిల్వ చేసుకోవడానికి కోల్డ్ స్టోరేజీ లేదు.
translatedText: When vegetable prices crash there is no cold storage to keep produce.

text: Requesting a tailoring unit for the women's self-help groups; they have training but no equipment.
translatedText: Requesting a tailoring unit for the women's self-help groups; they have training but no equipment.

text: వారానికి ఒక్కసారే నీళ్లు వస్తున్నాయి. ట్యాంకర్ కోసం గంటలు నిలబడాలి.
translatedText: Water comes only once a week. We stand in line for hours for the tanker.

text: చెరువు ఎండిపోయింది, పశువులకు కూడా నీళ్లు లేవు.
translatedText: The tank has dried up; there is no water even for cattle.

text: Requesting a tailoring unit for the women's self-help groups; they have training but no equipment.
translatedText: Requesting a tailoring unit for the women's self-help groups; they have training but no equipment.

text: உள் தெருக்கள் அனைத்தும் மண் சாலைகள். சிமெண்ட் சாலை போட்டுத் தரவும்.
translatedText: All inner streets are mud roads. Please lay cement roads.

text: हमारे स्कूल में विज्ञान की प्रयोगशाला नहीं है। बच्चों को प्रैक्टिकल के लिए शहर जाना पड़ता है।
translatedText: Our school has no science lab. Children must travel to town for practicals.

text: गली में स्ट्रीट लाइट नहीं है, रात में महिलाओं का निकलना मुश्किल है।
translatedText: There are no street lights in the lane; it is hard for women to go out at night.

text: ప్రభుత్వ పాఠశాలలో తరగతి గదులు సరిపోవడం లేదు, ఒక్క గదిలో రెండు తరగతులు నడుస్తున్నాయి.
translatedText: Classrooms in the government school are insufficient; two classes run in one room.
